content: @supabase/ssr provides createBrowserClient (client components) and createServerClient (Server Components/Actions/Route Handlers, cookie-based). signUp({email,password}) and signInWithPassword({email,password}) are called via the server client from a Server Action. Always use getUser() (validates token server-side) rather than getSession() when gating protected pages/middleware, since getSession() trusts the local cookie without revalidation.
